files.descriptor: Mastercard brand mandate MCS-2026-R3 Part 1 of 2; mandate overview, MDES token brand rules (BR-01–BR-05), and MAC Level 2 certification gates; compliance deadline 2026-09-30

Mastercard mandate MCS-2026-R3-T Part 2 of 2; ISO 8583 DE 48.66/48.77/48.78 additions, revised interchange tiers with token-enhanced rates, Banknet and Reg II routing rules, DSR and Reg II reporting obligations; network effective 2026-07-01
